pick.description: Intraday screener agent — scans entire Nifty 50 for high-value stocks, applies 8-point screener, writes rich HTML at analysis/<date>/<counter>.html
Run the intraday screener: scan full Nifty 50 for high-value (anti-manipulation) stocks, apply 8-point screener, pick the best, write HTML output at analysis/<date>/<counter>.html.
pick.template: Run the intraday screener workflow — scan the entire Nifty 50 for high-value stocks (prefer price > ₹500 to avoid manipulation), apply 8 criteria, pick the best stock, and write the HTML output at analysis/<date>/<counter>.html.

project-context.description: Master project context — load this whenever working on any file in this repo. Covers all files, strategies, workflows, data schemas, and known issues.

context.project: Indian Stock Market Intraday Trading Tools
context.project_skill: .opencode/skills/project-context/SKILL.md — load this skill for complete project context
context.description: A collection of agents and scripts for NSE intraday analysis: (1) Intraday Screener Agent - scans Nifty 50 with 8-point filter, generates rich HTML reports; (2) Small Gap Snap Paper Trader - automated gap-reversal strategy with morning picks and evening verdicts; (3) Full Backtest Engine - validates gap strategy across 49 Nifty stocks

key_files.agent_definition: .opencode/agents/pick.md — The main intraday screener agent (primary mode)
key_files.html_generator: agent/generate_pick_html.py — [MISSING] Required by pick.md but does not exist. Must be created for HTML output to work.
key_files.paper_trader: paper_trader/trader.py — Small Gap Snap strategy (gap 0.3-0.8%, reverse direction, target 50% fill, SL 0.5%)
key_files.backtest_engine: paper_trader/backtest_small_gap_snap.py — Parallel backtest across 49 Nifty stocks, 62-day window
key_files.historical_data: data.json — OHLC, EMAs, RSI, gap analysis for RELIANCE and TCS (62 trading days)
key_files.dashboard: index.html — Paper trader dashboard with Chart.js, cumulative PnL, daily breakdown
key_files.strategy_docs: md files/ — Contains strategy documentation (screener, gap-reversal, day-wise breakdowns)

workflow.pick_command: Run the pick agent -> research live data -> scan Nifty 50 -> apply 8-point screener -> write JSON to agent/live_pick_data.json -> run python agent/generate_pick_html.py (MISSING) -> output to analysis/<date>/<counter>.html
workflow.paper_trader_morning: python paper_trader/trader.py --mode morning (scans gaps at ~9:30 AM IST)
workflow.paper_trader_evening: python paper_trader/trader.py --mode evening (resolves pending trades at ~3:30 PM IST)

critical_issues: agent/generate_pick_html.py does NOT exist — The pick.md workflow references it for HTML generation. Need to create it first.
agent/ directory does not exist — Must be created to hold live_pick_data.json and generate_pick_html.py
analysis/ directory does not exist — Must be created for HTML output (gitignored per .gitignore)
context.nifty_50_list: RELIANCE, TCS, HDFCBANK, INFY, ICICIBANK, HINDUNILVR, ITC, SBIN, BHARTIARTL, KOTAKBANK, LT, WIPRO, AXISBANK, BAJFINANCE, MARUTI, TITAN, SUNPHARMA, ONGC, NTPC, POWERGRID, M&M, HCLTECH, ULTRACEMCO, NESTLEIND, ASIANPAINT, JSWSTEEL, ADANIPORTS, HINDALCO, TATASTEEL, BAJAJFINSV, DRREDDY, ADANIENT, BRITANNIA, CIPLA, COALINDIA, DIVISLAB, EICHERMOT, GRASIM, HEROMOTOCO, HDFCLIFE, SBILIFE, APOLLOHOSP, BPCL, BEL, BAJAJHLDNG, INDUSINDBK, SHRIRAMFIN, TATACONSUM, TRENT

screener_rules.anti_manipulation: Prefer stocks >₹500 (Tier 1: >₹1000). Higher price = lower manipulation risk.
screener_rules.candidate_min: Must analyze at least 4 stocks with full 8-point evaluation
